description: Calculate the volume of 'Stockpile A' using TopoCal from the drone survey point cloud at 'C:\workspace\data\stockpile_A.xyz' (Space-delimited: PointNumber, X, Y, Z). Determine the volume of the stockpile above the flat concrete base pad at an elevation of 1420.50 meters. Record the final calculated volume in cubic meters to 'C:\workspace\data\inventory_report.txt' using the format 'Volume: [value] m3'.
